name: Turtwig
description: Made from soil, the shell on its back hardens when it drinks water. It lives along lakes.

name: Chimchar
description: It agilely scales sheer cliffs to live atop craggy mountains. Its fire is put out when it sleeps.

attacks.name: Ember
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy attached to Chimchar.

name: Piplup
description: Because it is very proud, it hates accepting food from people. Its thick down guards it from cold.

name: Pachirisu
description: It makes fur balls that crackle with static electricity. It stores them with berries in tree holes.

attacks.name: Minor Errand-Running
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a basic Energy card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Thunder Jolt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, Pachirisu does 10 damage to itself.

name: Tropical Wind
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, remove 2 damage counters from each Active Pokémon (remove 1 damage counter if a Pokémon has only 1). If tails, each Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Buneary
description: It slams foes by sharply uncoiling its rolled ears. It stings enough to make a grown-up cry in pain.

attacks.name: Jump Kick
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Cranidos
description: It lived in jungles around 100 million years ago. Its skull is as hard as iron.

attacks.name: Steamroll
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Shieldon
description: A Pokémon that lived in jungles around 100 million years ago. Its facial hide is extremely hard.

attacks.name: Hard Face
attacks.effect: During your opponents next turn, any damage done to Shieldon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Shield Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage.

abilities.name: Forest Murmurs
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), if you have more Prize cards left than your opponent, you may choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch it with 1 of the Defending Pokémon. This power can't be used if Torterra is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Vigorous Dash
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Torterra does 30 damage to itself.

abilities.name: Burning Head
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may look at the top 3 cards of your deck, choose 1 of them, and put it into your hand. Discard the other 2 cards. This power can't be used if Infernape is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Flare Up
attacks.effect: Search your discard pile for 8 Fire Energy cards, show them to your opponent, and shuffle them into your deck. (This attack does nothing if you don't have 8 Fire Energy cards in your discard pile.)

abilities.name: Supreme Command
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may choose up to 2 cards from your opponent's hand without looking and put them face down next to the Defending Pokémon. (These cards are not in play or in your opponent's hand.) At the end of your opponent's next turn, return those cards to your opponent's hand. This power can't be used if Empoleon is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Hydro Impact
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 80 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Empoleon can't attack during your next turn.

abilities.name: Stance
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), when you put Lucario LV.X from your hand onto your Active Lucario, you may use this power. Prevent all effects of an attack, including damage, done to Lucario during your opponent's next turn. (If Lucario is no longer your Active Pokémon, this effect ends.)

attacks.name: Close Combat
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Lucario by attacks is increased by 30 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Buizel
description: It has a flotation sac that is like an inflatable collar. It floats on water with its head out.
effect: If Buizel has less Energy attached to it than the Defending Pokémon, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage.

name: Chatot
description: It can learn and speak human words. If they gather, they all learn the same saying.

attacks.name: Me First
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Tone-Deaf
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Shinx
description: All of its fur dazzles if danger is sensed. It flees while the foe is momentarily blinded.

attacks.name: Spark
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Pikachu
description: It lives in forests with others. It stores electricity in the pouches on its cheeks.

abilities.name: Electro Recycle
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Pichu is anywhere under Pikachu, you may search your discard pile for a Lightning Energy card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. This power can't be used if Pikachu is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: BikaBika
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage.

abilities.name: Time Skip
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may have your opponent flip 2 coins. If both of them are heads, your turn ends. If both of them are tails, after your opponent draws a card at the beginning of his or her next turn, his or her turn ends. This power can't be used if Dialga is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Metal Flash
attacks.effect: During your next turn, Dialga can't use Metal Flash.

abilities.name: Restructure
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may have your opponent switch 1 of your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. Then, you switch 1 of the Defending Pokémon with 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. This power can't be used if Palkia is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Hydro Reflect
attacks.effect: You may move all Energy cards attached to Palkia to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like. (Ignore this effect if you don't have any Benched Pokémon.)

abilities.name: Dark Shadow
abilities.effect: Each basic Darkness Energy card attached to your Darkness Pokémon now has the effect "If the Pokémon Darkness Energy is attached to attacks, the attack does 10 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance)." You can't use more than 1 Dark Shadow Poké-Body each turn.

attacks.name: Endless Darkness
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep. Flip 2 coins instead of 1 between turns. If either of them is tails, the Defending Pokémon is still Asleep. If both of them are tails, the Defending Pokémon is Knocked Out.

name: Magmortar
description: It blasts fireballs of over 3,600 degrees F from the ends of its arms. it lives in volcanic craters

attacks.name: Smoke Bomb
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin.  If tails, that attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Flame Drum
attacks.effect: If Magby isn't anywhere under Magmortar, discard 2 Energy cards from your hand. (If you can't discard 2 Energy cards from your hand, this attack does nothing.)

name: Raichu
description: It turns aggressive if it has too much electricity in its body. It discharges power through its tail.

attacks.name: Electromagnetic Induction
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Lightning Energy cards and attach them to 1 of your Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Explosive Thunder
attacks.effect: Discard all basic Lightning Energy cards attached to Raichu. This attack does 30 damage times the number of Lightning Energy cards you discarded.

name: Mime Jr.
description: It habitually mimics foes. Once mimicked, the foe cannot take its eyes off this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Baby Evolution
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may put Mr. Mime from your hand onto Mime Jr. (this counts as evolving Mime Jr.) and remove all damage counters from Mime Jr..

attacks.name: Mime
attacks.effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw a number of cards equal to the number of cards in your opponent's hand.

name: Glameow
description: It claws if displeased and purrs when affectionate. Its fickleness if very popular among some.

attacks.name: Charm
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done by attacks from the Defending Pokémon is reduced by 20 (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Pose
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Spacial Rend
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Stadium card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward. If there is any Stadium card in play, discard it.

attacks.name: Roar of Time
attacks.effect: Search your discard pile for 3 Pokémon, show them to your opponent, and put them on top of your deck. Shuffle your deck afterward. (If you don't have 3 Pokémon in your discard pile, this attack does nothing.)

name: Tropical Wind
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, remove 2 damage counters from each Active Pokémon (remove 1 damage counter if a Pokémon has only 1). If tails, each Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Dialga
description: It has the power to control time. It appears in Sinnoh-region myths as an ancient deity.

attacks.name: Time Bellow
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Flash Cannon
attacks.effect: You may return all Energy cards attached to Dialga to your hand. If you do, remove the highest Stage Evolution card from the Defending Pokémon and shuffle that card into your opponent's deck.

name: Palkia
description: It has the ability to distort space. It is described as a deity in Sinnoh-region mythology.

attacks.name: Spacial Rend
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Stadium card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward. If there is any Stadium card in play, discard it.

attacks.name: Transback
attacks.effect: You may flip a coin. If heads, discard all Energy attached to Palkia and put the Defending Pokémon and all cards attached to it on top of your opponent's deck. Your opponent shuffles his or her deck afterward.

abilities.name: Psybarrier
abilities.effect: Prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Mewtwo by your opponent's Pokémon that isn't an Evolved Pokémon.

attacks.name: Giga Burn
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy attached to Mewtwo.

attacks.name: Hard Crush
attacks.effect: Discard the top 5 cards of your deck. This attack does 50 damage for each Energy card you discarded.

attacks.name: Upthrow
attacks.effect: Search your discard pile for all Fighting Energy cards, show them to your opponent, and shuffle them into your deck.

abilities.name: Sacrifice
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may choose 1 of your Pokémon and that Pokémon is Knocked Out. Then, search your discard pile for up to 2 basic Energy cards, attach them to Regigigas, and remove 8 damage counters from Regigigas. This power can't be used if Regigigas is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Giga Blaster
attacks.effect: Discard the top card from your opponent's deck. Then, choose 1 card from your opponent's hand without looking and discard it. Regigigas can't use Giga Blaster during your next turn.

abilities.name: Heat Metal
abilities.effect: Your opponent can't remove the Special Condition Burned by evolving or devolving his or her Burned Pokémon. (This also includes putting a Pokémon Level-Up card onto the Burned Pokémon.) Whenever your opponent flips a coin for the Special Condition Burned between turns, treat it as tails.

name: Magnezone
description: It evolved from exposure to a special magnetic field. Three units generate magnetism.

attacks.name: Mirror Shot
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Magnet Slash
attacks.effect: Discard all Lightning Energy attached to Magnezone.

name: Dusknoir
description: The antenna on its head captures radio waves from the world of spirits that command it to take people there.

abilities.name: Dark Hide
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may flip a coin. If heads, look at your opponent's hand, choose a Pokémon you find there, and put it on the bottom of his or her deck. This power can't be used if Dusknoir is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Reaper Pulse
attacks.effect: Move up to 2 damage counters from Dusknoir to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Drifblim
description: It's drowzy in daytime, but flies off in the evening in big groups. No one knows where they go.

attacks.name: Wind Wave
attacks.effect: Search your discard pile for up to 5 in any combination of Pokémon and Supporter cards. Show them to your opponent and shuffle them into your deck.

attacks.name: Explosive Smoke
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's). (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

abilities.name: Install
abilities.effect: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), move a Technical Machine card attached to 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon. This power can't be used if Porygon-Z is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Learning
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Pokémon LV.X that levels up from 1 of your Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon. (This counts as leveling up that Pokémon). Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Overload
attacks.effect: Does 40 damage plus 20 more damage for each Technical Machine card attached to Porygon-Z.

abilities.name: Bind Eye
abilities.effect: As long as Gliscor is your Active Pokémon, your opponent can't remove any Special Conditions by evolving or devolving his or her Pokémon. (This also includes putting a Pokémon Level-Up card onto that Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Cutting Turn
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, put damage counters on the Defending Pokémon until it is 10HP away from being Knocked Out. If you do, shuffle Gliscor and all cards attached to it into your deck.

attacks.name: Friction Heat
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

abilities.name: Time Skip
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may have your opponent flip 2 coins. If both of them are heads, your turn ends. If both of them are tails, after your opponent draws a card at the beginning of his or her next turn, his or her turn ends. This power can't be used if Dialga is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Metal Flash
attacks.effect: During your next turn, Dialga can't use Metal Flash.

abilities.name: Invisible Tentacles
abilities.effect: Whenever your opponent's Pokémon tries to attack, your opponent discards 1 card from his or her hand. (If your opponent can't discard 1 card, your opponent's Pokémon can't attack.) You can't use more than 1 Invisible Tentacles Poké-Body each turn.

attacks.name: Darkness Lost
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) If any of your opponent's Pokémon would be Knocked Out by damage from this attack, put that Pokémon and all cards attached to it in the Lost Zone instead of discarding it.

abilities.name: Revenge Seed
abilities.effect: If any of your Grass Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack during his or her last turn, each of Shaymin's attacks does 60 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Energy Flare
attacks.effect: You may move any number of Energy cards attached to your Pokémon to your other Pokémon in any way you like.

name: Regigigas
description: There is an enduring legend that states this Pokémon towed continents with ropes.

attacks.name: Drag Off
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, you may choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch it with 1 of the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Giga Hammer
attacks.effect: Regigigas can't use Giga Hammer during your next turn.

abilities.name: Leap Away
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Toxicroak  is your Active Pokémon, you may flip a coin. If heads, return Toxicroak  and all cards attached to it to your hand. This Power can't be used if Toxicroak  is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Poison Revenge
attacks.effect: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack during his or her last turn, this attack does 20 damage plus 40 more damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Power Whip
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 10 damage for each Energy attached to Carnivine  to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Grass Knot
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Colorless Energy in the Defending Pokémon's Retreat Cost (after applying effects to the Retreat Cost).

attacks.name: Nose Unit
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon that has any Poké-Bodies. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Loud Snort
attacks.effect: Probopass 's Retreat Cost is 0 until the end of your next turn.

name: Magnezone
description: It evolved from exposure to a special magnetic field. Three units generate magnetism.

attacks.name: Charge Beam
attacks.effect: Search your discard pile for an Energy card and attach it to Magnezone.

attacks.name: Metallic Bolt
attacks.effect: You may discard a Lightning Energy and a Metal Energy attached to Magnezone. If you do, this attack's base damage is 120 instead of 60.

abilities.name: Call for Power
abilities.effect: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may move an Energy attached to 1 of your Pokémon to Charizard . This power can't be used if Charizard  is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Malevolent Fire
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard all Energy attached to Charizard .

abilities.name: Healing Breath
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), when you put Garchomp  LV.X from your hand onto your Active Garchomp , you may remove all damage counters from each of your Pokémon SP.

attacks.name: Dragon Rush
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy attached to Garchomp . Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 80 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Garchomp  can't use Dragon Rush during your next turn.

abilities.name: Dragon Spirit
abilities.effect: If Rayquaza  is your Active Pokémon and is damaged but not Knocked Out by an opponent's attack, you may search your discard pile for an Energy card and attach it to Rayquaza .

attacks.name: Final Blowup
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy attached to Rayquaza . Ignore this effect if you have no cards in your hand.

name: Tropical Wind
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, remove 2 damage counters from each Active Pokémon (remove 1 damage counter if a Pokémon has only 1). If tails, each Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Dialga
description: It has the power to control time. It appears in Sinnoh-region myths as an ancient deity.

attacks.name: Time Call
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a card that evolves from 1 of your Pokémon and put it on that Pokémon. (This counts as evolving that Pokémon.) Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Time Wager
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If either of them is tails, this attack's base damage is 50 instead of 100.

name: Arceus
description: It is said to have emerged from an egg in a place where there was nothing, then shaped the world.

attacks.name: Judgment
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy cards attached to Arceus and this attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Cresselia
description: On nights around the quarter moon, the aurora from its tail extends and undulates beautifully.

abilities.name: Lunar Aura
abilities.effect: If you have Darkrai in play, remove 1 damage counter from Cresselia between turns.

attacks.name: Lunar Flight
attacks.effect: Does 80 damage minus 10 damage for each damage counter on Cresselia.

name: Darkrai
description: To protect itself, it afflicts those around it with nightmares. However, it means no harm.

abilities.name: Darkness Aura
abilities.effect: If you have Cresselia in play, each of Darkrai's attacks does 20 more damage to the Defending Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Hypnoblast
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

abilities.name: Multitype
abilities.effect: Arceus LV.X's type is the same type as its previous Level.

name: Beginning Door
effect: Search your deck for Arceus, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Ultimate Zone
effect: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card. During each player's turn, the player may move an Energy card attached to 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon to his or her Active Arceus as often as he or she likes.

abilities.name: Multitype
abilities.effect: Arceus LV.X's type is the same type as its previous Level.

attacks.name: Meteor Blast
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack's base damage is 50 instead of 100.
